title: The Great Alchemical Compendium [More Magic Series]
description: An ancient tome filled to the brim with incredible potions and the recipes to make them!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- Spell Power Attribute
- Runes
### Strongly Recommended
- Wizards - some potions grant spell power bonuses and debuffs
- Paladins and Priests - some potions grant healing power bonuses and debuffs
# ⚗️ Features
Brew more than 30 new potions that grant you the most powerfull or terrible effects!

### This is a list of the potions added:

- Potion of Improved Strength that make your physical melee attacks more powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potion of Improved Weakness that make your physical melee attacks more weak of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Elemental Spell Power that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more powerfull of   20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Elemental Spell Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more weak of   20% for each level of the effect
- Elementals Endurance potions that reduce the damage taken of the corresponding type  of 30% for each level of the effect
- Elementals Vulnerability potions that increase the damage taken of the corresponding type  of 30% for each level of the effect
- Potion of Stone Skin that add +4 at your armor level for each level of the effect
- Potion of Paper Skin that add -4 at your armor level for each level of the effect
- Potions of Critical Damage and Critical Chance that make your attacks crit more and more frequently of 40% and 20% for each level of the effect
### Improve your potions
All of the potion have a long and strong variant!

# 🔧 Configuration
 

**Effects bonuses:**
- config/the_great_alchemical_compendium/effects
